citations.claim: The tool reads attestation data from a hardcoded file path and handles read errors with exit code 1
Uses attestation.VerifyJSON() as the core verification function and handles parsing errors
Outputs hardware information including chip name and hardware model from the attestation
Provides clear success/failure indication with descriptive messages and appropriate exit codes
Imports the coordinator's internal attestation package for verification functionality
VerifyJSON function parses JSON data into SignedAttestation struct and delegates to Verify function
The Verify function checks P-256 ECDSA signatures and validates security requirements including Secure Enclave, SIP, and Secure Boot
AttestationBlob struct mirrors Swift AttestationBlob with alphabetically ordered fields for JSON compatibility
The package provides cross-language JSON compatibility between Swift's JSONEncoder and Go's encoding/json
Package verifies signed attestation blobs from Darkbloom provider nodes using Apple Secure Enclave P-256 ECDSA keys
